1998June 7, 1998

🇩🇪 Bad Aibling, Germany

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Bad Aibling, Germany, June 7, 1998 -- June 17, 1998

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1998-06-bad-aibling-germany

25 Resolutions

378Plenary
Thank Bernd and Ramona Wenzel and EuroSTEP support staff
SC 4 wishes to thank Bernd and Ramona Wenzel and the EuroSTEP support staff including the following members for their excellent service and hospitality in facilitating the Spring 1998 SC 4 meeting ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
377Plenary
Ensure STEP parts are Year 2000 compliant
SC 4 resolves to ensure that the international standard parts of STEP are Year 2000 compliant and to include necessary revisions for compliance as a part of the Technical Corrigendum for EXPRESS er...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
376Plenary
Request statements of user requirements and milestones for next SC 4 release
In order to provide a firm foundation for the next release of SC 4 standards tentatively scheduled for 2003, SC 4 requests: * P-members to supply statements of user requirements for this timescale,...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
375Plenary
Approve PWI in furniture product data and project data
SC 4 approves the PWI in furniture product data and project data as described in SC 4 N 735
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
374Plenary
Approve PWI on STEP Modularization
SC 4 approves the Preliminary Work Item on STEP Modularization as described in document WG 10 N185 (SC 4 N 736) and appoints David Price as Project Leader. This project is assigned to WG 10
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
373Plenary
Instruct Change Management Team to check New Work Item proposals
SC 4 instructs its Change management team to check all Proposals for New Work Items against timescale and resources. The following questions for check have to be considered before a proposal goes o...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
372Plenary
Approve MoU documented in SC 4 N 732
SC 4 approves the MoU as documented in SC 4 N 732.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
371Plenary
Request Secretariat report on anticipated electronic operation of SC 4
SC 4 notes the Paris 3 resolution of ISO/TC 184 and requests the SC 4 Secretariat to prepare a report for the Beijing meeting describing the anticipated electronic operation of SC 4 by September 19...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
370Plenary
Endorse extension of ISO/IEC UN/ECE MoU into electronic business
SC 4 notes the progress to extend the ISO/IEC UN/ECE Memorandum of Understanding into the domain of electronic business and the specific invitation for the participation of the SC 4 Chairman as a m...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
369Plenary
Approve PWI on Dimensional Inspection Information Exchange
SC 4 approves the establishment of a Preliminary Work Item on Dimensional Inspection Information Exchange (SC 4 N734).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
368Plenary
Note IEC Sector Board 3 work and encourage global strategy
SC 4 notes the work of IEC Sector Board 3 and the encouragement given by ISO/TC 184 (Paris Resolution 1) to the ISO/TC 184 Chairman
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
367Plenary
Thank Meinolf Groepper for his service and liaison work
SC 4 wishes to thank Mr. Groepper for his active work within the SC 4 community, for his service on the SC 4 Policy and Planning Committee, both as a member and as Rapporteur and for his work as jo...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
366Plenary
Approve PWI on Process Plant Operations and Maintenance
SC 4 approves the Preliminary Work Item on Process Plant Operations and Maintenance described in the proposal document (SC 4 N 733)
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
365Plenary
Forward Technical Corrigendum 2 for ISO 10303-203 to ISO for publication
SC 4 resolves to forward “Technical Corrigendum 2, Industrial automation systems and integration ‣ Product data representation and Exchange ‣ Part 203: Application protocol: Configuration controlle...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
364Plenary
Establish active two-way liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/WG 4
SC 4 requests an active two-way liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/WG 4 (Document Description Languages), and requests the SC 4 Secretary confirm this liaison with the ISO Central Secretariat
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
363Plenary
Establish active two-way liaison with European Marine STEP Association
SC 4 requests an active two-way liaison with European Marine STEP Association, and requests the SC 4 Secretary confirm this liaison with ISO Central Secretariat
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
362Plenary
Extend SEDS procedures to cover standing documents and technical reports
SC 4 approves extending the scope of the SEDS procedures to cover: * SC 4 standing documents; * SC 4 technical reports
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
361Plenary
Define ISO 10303 Release 2.0 parts and schedule
SC 4 resolves that ISO 10303 Release 2.0 comprises the following parts and instructs the project leaders to complete the work necessary to make them international standards by April, 2000. * Part 1...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
360Plenary
Approve Bruno Schilli as Deputy Convener of WG 3
SC 4 approves Bruno Schilli as Deputy Convener of ISO/TC 184/SC 4/WG 3.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
359Plenary
Approve PWI proposal for history-based shape modeling
SC 4 approves acceptance of the PWI proposal (SC 4 N715) entitled `History-based shape modeling', and directs the Secretariat to take appropriate action to initiate the Work Item.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
358Plenary
Add wording to SC 4 Handbook Section 2.3 on normative references
SC 4 resolves to add the following language to the SC 4 Handbook, Section 2.3 The Proposal Stage. The language shall be added as a new paragraph after paragraph 3. For any normative references, the...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
357Plenary
Thank Sharon Kemmerer for her service as SC 4 Secretary
SC 4 wishes to thank Ms. Sharon Kemmerer for her contributions as SC 4 Secretary
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
356Plenary
Publish SC 4 organizational handbook in a Web-based format
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 instructs its secretariat and PPC to publish the SC 4 organizational handbook in a Web-based format which does not duplicate the ISO directives, but provides hypertext links to the ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
355Plenary
Instruct project leaders to develop proposals and establish a registration authority
SC 4 instructs the ISO 10303-221 project leader and the ISO 15926 PWI team leader to develop the technical and business proposal for approval by SC 4 before submission for approval by ISO
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
354Plenary
Approve new project leaders and project editors
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== | ISO Project # | Project Lead | Document Editor | 10303-221 | David Leal (primary) + Hans ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
